PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($p\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess; Write-Output "PID su 3001: $\($proc.Id\)"; Write-Output "Avviato: $\($proc.StartTime\)" } else { Write-Output "Niente in ascolto su 3001" }; Write-Output "Ora attuale: $\(Get-Date\)"; $f = Get-Item 'C:\\Users\\Pc\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\concorsi-ai\\api\\proxy.js'; Write-Output "proxy.js modificato: $\($f.LastWriteTime\)")
